arts.ttl: Ødegaard injury worse than feared: how long will the Arsenal player be out for and which games will he miss?
arts.sum: At first, it was thought that Ødegaard had suffered a sprain but tests have revealed more worrying damage as Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta confirmed today, ahead of tomorrow’s Champions League opener against Atalanta . Mikel Arteta has confirmed the worst fears regarding Martin Ødegaard, who picked up an ankle injury during the recent international break.

arts.ttl: Romano drops huge transfer update on Arsenal's North London Derby hero
arts.sum: Arsenal will sit down with Gabriel Magalhaes to discuss a new contract in the not-too-distant future, according to Fabrizio Romano. In fact, the Gunners are planning to eventually sit down with the defender to discuss fresh terms, with his current contract expiring in 2027.

arts.ttl: FPL long view: Get ready to load up on Arsenal in Gameweek 6
arts.sum: Back-to-back home matches against promoted pair Leicester City and Southampton, combined with a visit to AFC Bournemouth immediately afterwards, could help Bukayo Saka (£10.0m) and Kai Havertz (£8.1m) deliver huge hauls. In defence, Gabriel (£6.0m) is by far the most attacking pick thanks to his huge threat at set-pieces – the Brazilian’s headed goal in the 1-0 win against Tottenham Hotspur last weekend earned him a bumper 15-point haul.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Man City suffer Kevin De Bruyne injury scare as star taken off ahead of Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne was withdrawn during Manchester City's meeting with Inter Milan in the Champions League on Wednesday night after appearing to pick up an injury in the first half

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Jorginho issues warning ahead of Champions League opener - "We have to learn"
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Jorginho admits that the team have to pick up better results on the road this year if they are to advance to the latter stages of the Champions League

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Arteta and Jorginho full of praise for Gasperini and Atalanta
arts.sum: Arsenal coach Mikel Arteta admits having ‘big admiration’ for Gian Piero Gasperini and what he’s...

arts.ttl: 'We have studied them': Sead Kolasinac shares his honest thoughts on Arsenal ahead facing them with Atalanta
Arsenal star Bukayo Saka admits he 'misses' three former team-mates following their summer exits
arts.sum: This summer's transfer window proved to be another busy one for Arteta's side, with Calafiori, Merino and Sterling among new arrivals, while a number of others departed.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Have Joined the Race to Sign 120m Star
arts.sum: Arsenal have joined the race to sign Bayern Munich forward Jamal Musiala.

arts.ttl: Arsenal hero Thierry Henry fumes in heated row with another pundit
arts.sum: And that led to a heated debate about the MLS as Henry, who played for New York Red Bulls during a glittering career, claimed that American footballers from his time were better than the current group. Grella then issued the following statement: "I know you played in MLS, I replaced you.
